gold.name: Priya Raman
claims: Priya Raman is the chief technology officer of Halewood Systems.
Priya Raman joined Halewood Systems in 2019.
Priya Raman worked at Corvex Labs for eleven years.
Priya Raman led the compiler tools group at Corvex Labs.
Priya Raman studied electrical engineering at the University of Waterloo.
Priya Raman holds four patents in program analysis.
